verse_text: 'One witness shall not rise against a man about any injustice or offense or sin concerning which he may be guilty; by the mouth of two or three witnesses the matter shall be established.

links.context: The message of the first angel is confirmed by the multitude, fulfilling the Law in which every word is established with two or three witnesses ([[DEU.19:15]]). Christ Himself is our peace who has come to earth; in Him, man is no longer estranged from God (see [[EPH.2:14]]-16).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
